title: Media Editor Decision
description: Phase 2.2 editor decision record for a rendered take: scores and camera compliance are measured from the actual output, with declared vs observed engine fields so misrepresentation is detectable.

motion_score.description: Measured motion quality on the animated frames, normalized 0.0-1.0.

identity_score.description: Measured likeness score on animated frames; null when no identity target applies to the shot.

camera_compliance.description: Declared-vs-measured camera and engine compliance for the take.

declared_engine.description: Engine the job claimed to use.

observed_engine_signature.description: Engine signature actually measured from the rendered output.

example.notes: Motion smooth; no identity target in this establishing shot.
